description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to run a job on both ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04, with concurrency control to cancel in-progress jobs. The job should set up the environment, install dependencies, start Xvfb, and then checkout the repository, cache pyenv and third-party packages, build BioDynaMo, run unit tests, and perform style guide checks.
